title: What if Shinji was more like Ash Ketchum
display_title: What if Shinji was more like Ash Ketchum
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji was more like Ash Ketchum?             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:00 am Seeing as how there's a "What if Shinji were more like Ash Williams?" thread, I figured this couldn't hurt. What if Shinji were more like Ash Ketchum from the Pokémon series? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:00 am "UNIT-01, I CHOOSE YOU!"

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:05 am man, I don't want to even know I never cared for Pokemon, so yeah

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:05 am IMO he would actually be more annoying but in a different way, and not as easy to relate to as a character

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:07 am He would have the guns on Unit-01 shoot Pokeballs, and he would try to capture the Angels so he could have them fight in tournaments. He would definitely be infinitely manlier, but that's almost like dividing by zero or something. EDIT: The question I asked has already been asked, because I'm a dipshit.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:08 am ^lol, wrong thread

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:10 am He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:11 am esselfortium wrote: He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:11 am esselfortium wrote: He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:11 am esselfortium wrote: He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:12 am somehow, I can't imagine Ash Ketchum being upset about teh LCL/Tang wouldn't he find himself just giddy at the idea that any creature he ever wanted could be had in teh tang?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:13 am CorporalChaos wrote: esselfortium wrote: He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:14 am CorporalChaos wrote: esselfortium wrote: He'd have some skimpily-dressed redhead follow him halfway around the world because he "stole her bike", all the while missing any possible subtext or other motivation for-- oh, dammit, it'd be exactly the same wouldn't it -_-

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:16 am & Mari would be May

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:16 am Does this mean that Misato = Nurse Joy and Ritsuko = Officer Jenny and Gendo = Giovanni and the Angels = Team Rocket?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:16 am Fuyutsuki is Professor Oak. CorporalChaos wrote: Does this mean that Misato = Nurse Joy and Ritsuko = Officer Jenny and Gendo = Giovanni and the Angels = Team Rocket?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:18 am actually, Maya may be a somewhat better fit because you got May, you add an A after Y & voila!

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:18 am Well I think if he was more like Ash Ketchum Evangelion would be more like the land before time since that's a lot like pokemon. The reason being is there's a lot of parralells that can be drawn between land before time and pokemon. For example both series star a protagonist whose initially unsure of himself and goes on a journey , gathering both freind and self confidence. Also paralells could be drawn between Misty and Sarah, both are fiery female characters and while both could be a potential love interest for the protagnist this is never realized And if we relate this to the economy of china...wait that has nothing to do with this. Is it just me or does this all seem awfully familiar? Must be a complete and utter coincidence!

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:20 am Unit-01 would be like Pikachu because it's awesome and gets things done, whilst Unit-02 would be like Magikarp because it's red and is completely useless. Unit-00 would be something like Goldeen, because it's useless, but puts up a slightly better fight than Magikarp.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 29, 2009 3:20 am Defectron wrote: Well I think if he was more like Ash Ketchum Evangelion would be more like the land before time since that's a lot like pokemon. The reason being is there's a lot of parralells that can be drawn between land before time and pokemon. For example both series star a protagonist whose initially unsure of himself and goes on a journey , gathering both freind and self confidence. Also paralells could be drawn between Misty and Sarah, both are fiery female characters and while both could be a potential love interest for the protagnist this is never realized And if we relate this to the economy of china...wait that has nothing to do with this. Is it just me or does this all seem awfully familiar? Must be a complete and utter coincidence!
